entity.summary: Ethereum-born decentralized exchange and liquidity-aggregation protocol family launched in August 2020 and still active as a multi-chain DeFi stack under the Sushi brand.
entity.notes: Entity-level umbrella record. Launch is kept at month precision because official Sushi materials describe the project as created in late August 2020. Deployment-level and product-level modeling are still pending.

evidence.title: About Sushi
evidence.notes: First-party FAQ describes the protocol's launch period and current multichain exchange activity.
